instruction: In the inbox, archive every email from Ava Petrov and star the email with the subject “Holiday schedule”. Do not archive or star anything else.
diagnosis: State-tracking failure: archives worked, but the model never perceived rows disappearing — it re-clicked fixed coordinates while the list reflowed underneath, archiving 7 extra emails while blaming 'an unresponsive system'.

instruction: In Settings, enable Dark Mode and set the timezone to America/Vancouver, then save your changes. Leave every other setting as it is.
diagnosis: Environment finding: headless chromium renders native <select> dropdowns outside the page — the timezone options are invisible to any screenshot agent. Dark Mode itself was correctly enabled and saved.

instruction: Complete the checkout for Liam Rossi (email: liam.rossi@arcmail.org). Ship to 8816 Harbor Rd, Fairview, ZIP 33494. Submit the order at the review step.
diagnosis: Clean run: precise field clicks, correct typing, three wizard steps, submit.
